{"BaseResp":{"StatusCode":0,"StatusMessage":"success"},"code":0,"data":{"common_list_info":{"cursor":"","has_more":false,"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"20260323152200ADFE8D5B920078E54896"}"},"total":564},"data_list":[{"comment":{"comment_id":"7316075358799971082","common":{"comment_type":0,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"目前来说挺好看的，外挂也挺适合这类题材，就是有些地方逻辑不通，但也能看的过去。"},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1703407280,"group_id":"7308655201932545051","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"我从不恶意差评，二星三星代表着真的不行，四星五星还可以看看。","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2N5M+A4+zghuzmX+zv0hfIel1tNCQQ/1F43NiTfFOpQM3","gender":1,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":0,"user_avatar":"http://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/tos-cn-i-0000/00f94a9e6881494bb0a6bba181acfba7~tplv-s85hriknmn-jpeg-v1:144:0.jpeg?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1776791757&x-signature=vQ%2FyS15XoXA0c1UpB%2FksoOrAVhI%3D","user_id":"3720336959342488","user_name":"咯咯咯"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"3720336959342488","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"user_title_info":[]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7308655201932545051","book_info":{"abstract":"魂穿民国28年，高凌宇发现自己成了新政府旗下，76号特工总部，情报处的一名小情报员，简而言之便是投靠了小本子的狗汉奸。
而除了特工汉奸这个身份，他发现自己，居然还有另外一层身份，是军统的一名内线，是受到上海站站长陈恭树的命令，才潜伏在76号。
虽然成了名间谍，但高凌宇却丝毫不慌，因为魂穿后，他如愿获得了一种超凡能力，他竟可以做到，将自己的灵魂一分为二。而另外一半灵魂，可以附身在任何动物体内，随后便可做到随心所欲操控动物。
自此，整个上海，所有小动物，随时都可以被高凌宇完美利用，化作一名最具有隐蔽性的内线。","audio_thumb_uri":"https://p6-novel.byteimg.com/img/novel-pic/p2o309a96b5f0b4ae9509382ebc773f97ff~tplv-tt-cs0:440:440.image","author":"白色茶叶蛋","author_id":"","book_id":"7308655201932545051","book_name":"谍战：动物都是我的内线","book_short_name":"","book_type":"0","color_dominate":"#282830","creation_status":"1","genre":"0","genre_type":"0","read_count_text":"7656人在读","reader_schema":{"authorize_type":"1","category_schema":"[{"category_id":504,"name":"抗战谍战","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=504&name=抗战谍战&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":1,"name":"都市","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=1&name=都市&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":37,"name":"穿越","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=37&name=穿越&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":852,"name":"魂穿","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=852&name=魂穿&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"}]","first_chapter_item_id":"7308655740024324618","read_count":"7656","title_page_tags":"","word_number":"623909"},"relate_post_id":"","relate_post_schema":"","score":"8.2","serial_count":"364","tags":"抗战谍战,穿越,魂穿,都市","thumb_url":"https://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/novel-pic/p2o309a96b5f0b4ae9509382ebc773f97ff~tplv-noop.image?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1779434520&x-signature=WdRqTddWMqjeZNlrcIi6XMF1MFQ%3D","tomato_book_status":"1"},"book_info_list":[],"common_stat":{},"creator_id":"3469687023215438","extra":{"comment_jump_schema":"","novelapp_read_item_cnt":"84"},"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"20260323152200ADFE8D5B920078E54896"}"},"relate_info_list":[],"reply_show_count":0,"reply_show_row":0,"score":"8","score_suffix_text":"阅读1小时后点评"},"stat":{"digg_count":17,"forwarded_count":0,"listen_duration":0,"read_book_count":0,"read_duration":4204,"reply_count":1,"show_pv":6901},"user_action":{"author":0,"is_author_stick":false,"stick_position":0,"user_digg":false,"user_disagree":false}},"data_type":4},{"co
